summary: Iteration 117: Final production pressure test before go-live. Backend: 33/33 tests PASSED (100%). All core APIs working including auth, estates, beneficiaries, checklists, documents, messages, digital wallet, guardian, subscriptions, notifications, timeline, transition/DTS, admin, ops dashboard, settings, PDF export. Key BUG FIX VERIFIED: Admin role now properly allowed in require_benefactor_role guard for checklist accept/reject and digital wallet access. Frontend: Login, Guardian with 3 export buttons, Beneficiaries with succession hierarchy, Vault, Checklist, Settings pages all load correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login valid credentials returns access_token
Backend: /auth/me returns user profile with valid token
Backend: POST /api/checklists - admin can create items (200)
Backend: POST /api/checklists/{item_id}/accept - admin role passes require_benefactor_role (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
Backend: POST /api/checklists/{item_id}/reject-with-feedback - admin role works (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
Backend: GET /api/digital-wallet/{estate_id} - admin has access (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
Backend: GET /api/chat/sessions returns guardian chat sessions
Backend: GET /api/family-plan/status returns family plan info
Frontend: Login page loads with form (Username/Email, Password, Sign In button)
Frontend: Admin login redirects to /admin (Founder Dashboard)
Frontend: Founder Dashboard shows Code Health 100/100, 117 users, 91 estates
Frontend: Guardian page loads with New Chat button
Frontend: Guardian chat view shows 3 export buttons (transcript, plan, checklist)
Frontend: Beneficiaries page shows succession hierarchy with family tree

bug_fix_verification.issue: require_benefactor_role guard in guards.py didn't include admin role
bug_fix_verification.impact: Admin users got 403 Forbidden on checklist accept/reject and digital wallet access

critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiting is working correctly - aggressive protection against brute force (10 attempts = 3 minute lockout)
guards.py require_benefactor_role now correctly includes admin role
All ownership checks in documents.py, guardian.py, pdf_export.py, messages.py, digital_wallet.py include admin fallback

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, all critical elements found)

seed_data_creation: Test checklist items created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform is PRODUCTION READY. All 33 backend API tests pass. All major frontend pages load correctly. Admin role bug fix verified across checklist accept/reject and digital wallet access. Rate limiting works correctly (429 errors are expected behavior, not bugs). Key data-testids verified: new-chat-btn, export-transcript-btn, export-plan-btn, export-checklist-pdf-btn. VAPID push notifications return 503 in preview (expected - no VAPID keys). Guardian AI (xAI Grok) integration is live. Stripe payments configured with live keys.
console_errors_summary: 429 rate limiting errors during testing - normal behavior from aggressive rate limiting protection
notes: Previous iterations: 114 (PieProgress), 115 (IAC Report PDF), 116 (full platform health)
This iteration: Final production pressure test covering 40+ API endpoints and all major UI pages
All bug fixes from this session verified: require_benefactor_role now includes admin
